title: Anthropic Files For An IPO: Rapid Reaction — With M.G. Siegler
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and M.G. Siegler discuss Anthropic's IPO filing, analyzing the timing relative to OpenAI, the competitive position of Claude, and whether the funding is strategically necessary. The conversation examines why it matters for Dario Amodei's company to go public first.
